## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 bullet points.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran relevant local checks or CI-safe validation
- [ ] I added or updated docs for user-visible behavior

## Safety Checklist (Required)

- [ ] I confirm I have written authorization for any real-world testing.
- [ ] I confirm this change is for defensive research, detection, or auditing.
- [ ] I confirm no operational payload is enabled by default.

## Scope Classification

- [ ] CVE intelligence / monitoring
- [ ] Integrity / auditing / reporting
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Sensitive path change (payloads, firmware, flipper, usb_payload, mobile)

## Risk Notes

List expected risks, mitigations, and rollback plan if applicable.
